heading: Loans by management companies
label: 80a–21 Loans by management companies
notes: Amendments1987—Subsec. (b). struck out “to the extension or renewal of any such loan made prior to , or” after “shall not apply”.Pub. L. 100–181March 15, 1940
amendments: Amendments1987—Subsec. (b). struck out “to the extension or renewal of any such loan made prior to , or” after “shall not apply”.Pub. L. 100–181March 15, 1940

children.label: a
children.text: the investment policies of such registered company, as recited in its registration statement and reports filed under this subchapter, do not permit such a loan; or

children.label: b
children.text: such person controls or is under common control with such registered company; except that the provisions of this paragraph shall not apply to any loan from a registered company to a company which owns all of the outstanding securities of such registered company, except directors’ qualifying shares.
